Art

Occasion Cards & Gifts

Handmade greeting cards for every occasion

📍 Cashel Market📍 Keel Market

About Occasion Cards & Gifts

Occasion Cards & Gifts is a lovely, thoughtful stall at Achill Island Market that specialises in handmade and printed greeting cards for every life event. Whether you need a card for a retirement, a birthday, a new baby, or just to say "get well soon," this stall has you covered.

Each card is made with genuine care and attention to detail. Many feature original artwork, hand-lettering, or unique embellishments that you simply won't find in a shop. They're the kind of cards that people keep — not throw away.

The stall is also a great place to pick up small gift items that pair perfectly with a card. It's always one of the most browsed stalls at the market, with visitors spending time reading and choosing the perfect card.

What You'll Find

🎂 Birthday Cards

Handmade birthday cards for all ages — from children to milestone birthdays.

🎓 Retirement Cards

Thoughtful retirement cards that celebrate a life's work.

💐 Get Well Cards

Warm get-well cards to brighten someone's day when they need it most.

🎁 Small Gifts

Complementary gift items to pair with a card — thoughtful and affordable.
